creator: bmah@ca.sandia.gov
text:
The following unified diff updates the net/vnc port (which I am the
maintainer) from 3.3.2r2 to 3.3.2r3.  (Minor bugfixes for the most part.)

patches/patch-ac is supposed to go away, but I wasn't sure how to make
diff/patch do this.  The diff below makes patches/patch-ac a zero-length
file which, while technically correct, wasn't what I wanted.
